overall.description: A third-person Unreal Engine 5 gameplay clip showing a character exploring a sunlit meadow with tall grass and wildflowers. The character walks from a shaded tree area through an open field with a distant city skyline visible, eventually turning around to walk back toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: meadow edge near large shade tree

events.description: character moves from shaded area under the large tree into direct sunlight
character steps onto and crosses the dirt path cutting through the meadow

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily away from the large olive tree through tall grass toward the open field and dirt path

entered.detail: mature broad-canopy tree providing shade at the meadow's edge
dense field of golden-brown tall grass with scattered white wildflowers
worn dirt trail cutting through the meadow toward the city
cluster of modern office buildings and towers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the shade of a large olive tree at the edge of a meadow. The character walks forward through tall golden grass, emerging into direct sunlight as they approach and cross a dirt path, with a distant modern city skyline visible ahead against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wildflower meadow with urban backdrop

events.description: character enters denser patch of wildflowers with white blooms visible in the grass

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the open meadow, veering slightly left while maintaining a steady pace through the tall grass

entered.detail: thick cluster of green trees forming the eastern boundary of the meadow
tall apartment buildings visible beyond the tree line on the left

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the open meadow, the character walks through tall grass dotted with white wildflowers. The dirt path falls behind as the city skyline shifts to the left, while a dense tree line becomes prominent on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: central meadow with 360-degree views of city and woodland

agents.ego_description: character continues exploring the meadow interior, walking through uniform tall grass with the city skyline now visible to the right

entered.detail: lush green forested area forming the western boundary of the field

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the heart of the meadow, with the city skyline now visible to the right and a green woodland to the left. The environment remains consistent with tall grass and clear skies as the character approaches the point where they will turn back.

scene_state.functional_zone: meadow interior facing back toward starting point

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn to face the camera and begins walking back

agents.ego_description: character turns around to face the camera and walks back through the tall grass toward the original starting area

entered.detail: the large olive tree from the beginning of the clip now visible ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns 180 degrees to face the camera and begins walking back through the meadow. The large solitary tree from the start of the clip appears in the distance ahead, while the city skyline remains visible on the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit meadow that transitions from a shaded grove into an open field before reversing direction. It begins in the cool shade of a large olive tree, moving forward as the character emerges into direct sunlight to cross a dirt path with a modern city skyline visible on the horizon. As the character pushes deeper into the meadow, the path falls away and the skyline shifts to the left, giving way to a dense tree line on the right and white wildflowers scattered through the tall grass. The scene then opens further into the heart of the field, where the city and a green woodland flank the character on opposite sides under a clear blue sky. Finally, the character turns 180 degrees to face the camera, walking back through the golden grass toward the solitary olive tree now visible in the distance.
